raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Republican Leader Shannon Grove has introduced an amendment to Assembly Bill 5 that would offer parity across the board and protect independent contractors.",
    "Legislative Democrats are advocating for AB 5 which will hinder the employment status of tens of thousands of independent contractors.",
    "AB 5 offers carve-outs to some industries that employ independent contractors while excluding others.",
    "If Senator Grove's amendment is defeated, additional amendments will be offered to protect independent contractors.",
    "The U.S. Chamber of Commerce opposes AB 5, citing that the bill threatens to undermine longstanding business relationships.",
    "Senate Republicans' amendments will cover multiple industries that are currently excluded from AB 5."
  ]
}
```
